Sincerely,
Providence Center Billing Team

• CPT 90834 – Individual psychotherapy, 45 minutes
• CPT 90853 – Group psychotherapy

Your psychiatrist or the hospital’s billing department will complete the actual coding. You can simply write "inpatient behavioral health stay" in the description field if you don’t have the exact revenue/CPT codes yet.

If you receive an itemized bill, it may list multiple revenue codes on separate lines (e.g., room/board, pharmacy, lab, therapy). That can look confusing but is normal.

Once your provider fills out their portion, you can upload everything to the carrier portal or send it back to us and we’ll forward it. Let us know if you’d like us to note that this was an urgent mental health admission following a period of escalating suicidal ideation, as that sometimes helps with processing timelines.

Wishing you a safe and steady recovery,

Kendra James
Benefits Specialist
CascadeCare Health Services
